JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER; REPORTER: KIM SCHROEDER C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ARNOLD W. EVJE, II APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF; MR. HEPTONSTALL WAS PRESENT BUT HIS ANSWER HAD PREVIOUSLY BEEN STRICKEN SO CASE PROCEEDED AS A PROVE-UP. JUDGMENT SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEPTONSTALL, JOHN R.
